title: stellarioides robusta
intro: Stellarioides robusta, also known as the robust stellaria, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, stellarioides robusta is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for easier consumption.
